mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_offline_message_content ( message_id, conversation_type, conversation_id, message_seq, sender_id, receiver_id, message_time, message_type, message_content, priority, expire_time, is_archived, archive_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{conversationType}, #{conversationId}, #{messageSeq}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{messageTime}, #{messageType}, #{messageContent}, #{priority}, #{expireTime}, #{isArchived}, #{archiveTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )

INSERT INTO im_offline_message_content ( message_id, conversation_type, conversation_id, message_seq, sender_id, receiver_id, message_time, message_type, message_content, priority, expire_time, is_archived, archive_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.messageId}, #{item.conversationType}, #{item.conversationId}, #{item.messageSeq}, #{item.senderId}, #{item.receiverId}, #{item.messageTime}, #{item.messageType}, #{item.messageContent}, #{item.priority}, #{item.expireTime}, #{item.isArchived}, #{item.archiveTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE update_time = VALUES(update_time)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM im_offline_message_content WHERE expire_time IS NOT NULL AND expire_time <= #{currentTime}

DELETE FROM im_offline_message_content WHERE message_id IN ( SELECT d.message_id FROM im_offline_message_delivery d WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND d.delivery_status = 1 AND d.message_id = im_offline_message_content.message_id )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM im_offline_message_content WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000)
mapper.update: UPDATE im_offline_message_content SET is_archived = #{isArchived}, archive_time = #{archiveTime}, update_time = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 WHERE message_id = #{messageId}

UPDATE im_offline_message_content SET expire_time = #{expireTime}, update_time = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 WHERE message_id IN
#{messageId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.message_id FROM im_offline_message_content m INNER JOIN im_offline_message_delivery d ON m.message_id = d.message_id WHERE m.create_time <= #{archiveTime} AND m.is_archived = 0 AND d.delivery_status = 1 LIMIT 1000
